modeling_constraints: Do not hard-code validation stimulus, stop times, sample windows, gold internals, or simulator side channels.
problem_statement: the supplied system violates the public contract

properties.observable_contract: Consume one MSB-first bit on each rising `ready` crossing, starting with bit 12 and ending with bit 0.
Add the corresponding binary weight when `din` is high.
Increment `dnum` for each high decision in the current frame.
On each rising `clks` crossing, publish the previous frame as a normalized bipolar output.
Map an all-low frame to `-0.5` and an all-high frame near `+0.5`.
After publishing, reset the accumulator, high-bit count, and bit pointer for the next frame.

title: SAR 13bit Serial Decoder
